page_metadata.biotools__summary: SplitPocket is a web server for identification of functional surfaces of proteins from their structure coordinates. Identification is based on the geometric concept of a split pocket, which is a pocket split by a binding ligand. &gt,26,000 structures in PDB have been found to have split pockets.
